business_ideas.idea: Metamucil for Millennials: D2C fiber supplement with modern branding.
Second Opinion calm: paid service for objective advice on anything (dating, decisions).
Text Me A Secret calm: anonymous secret sharing with roulette-style matching.
Wash and fold service for low-income families to reclaim time.
Watercolors: Spotify for unfinished/work-in-progress music and art.
Chef's Table drops: high-end meal drops via IG Live chef demo + Facebook Shop.

predictions.text: Second Opinion works best with Tinder-adjacent viral catalysts like dating profile reviews.
Chef's Table meal drops could be QVC-style high-end food delivery at $100-150 per meal.
